info.heading: Get in Touch with Ethical Genesis.
info.subHeading: Have a question, partnership idea, or want to learn more about our AI solutions? Send us a message and our team will get back to you shortly.

successMessage.title: Message Successfully Sent.
successMessage.desc: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your message and an auto-reply confirmation has been sent to your email. Our team will get back to you shortly.
